name: Grade 1 Engineering — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 1 pathway for testing, measuring results, redesigning, and explaining solutions. Learning builds independence through investigation, guided practice, application, and reflection.
learningGoals: Develop first-grade knowledge and skills in testing, measuring results, redesigning, and explaining solutions.
Use speaking, drawing, writing, numbers, models, or movement to explain thinking.
Work independently when ready and ask for help, feedback, or clarification when needed.

lessons.title: Explore testing, measuring results, redesigning, and explaining solutions
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record testing, measuring results, redesigning, and explaining solutions by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record testing, measuring results, redesigning, and explaining solutions by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

resources.title: NGSS Engineering Design
resources.description: Planning reference for this Grade 1 Engineering pathway.

units.title: Investigate: testing, measuring results, redesigning, and explaining solutions
units.essentialQuestion: What evidence can we gather about testing, measuring results, redesigning, and explaining solutions?
outcomes: I can observe, discuss, and record testing, measuring results, redesigning, and explaining solutions.
I can use accurate words, pictures, numbers, models, writing, or movement to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Explore testing, measuring results, redesigning, and explaining solutions
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record testing, measuring results, redesigning, and explaining solutions by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

activities.title: Notice and investigate
activities.learnerAction: The learner uses age-appropriate materials and first-grade vocabulary to observe, discuss, and record testing, measuring results, redesigning, and explaining solutions. Adult supervision is provided whenever the subject involves tools, heat, animals, water, traffic, or online media.

successCriteria: The learner completes a first-grade task connected to testing, measuring results, redesigning, and explaining solutions.
The learner explains an observation, choice, or strategy with appropriate support.
The learner follows safety, care, and collaboration expectations.
